cards.back: A computer user who intentionally tries to discover or exploit vulnerabilities in an operating system
The ability of the operating system to manage and control multiple processes running on the computer
The process by which the operating system allocates system resources such as CPU, memory, and I/O devices
A theoretical model used to describe the different ways an operating system can be designed to protect against unauthorized access
Commands invoked by a process to request services from the operating system, such as reading or writing to files
